text.message: Oj and red are really ahead
12 is sick indeed, but still far behind

I have no chance to take road
And Oj just wins it now
he been getting all the rolls now tho

Red what you need for the road
we need red to extend 3 roads
i have no wood or brick tho
because oj gets to 11 with 1 more road
Red should have asked help there
city on hand 1 vp for sure
but no 7 would mean gg yeah
